chat_history.content: Find me 5 differentiated Companies that provide proactive, leading-indicator credit risk signals on businesses — flagging elevated risk of non-payment, bad debt, or financial distress either at customer onboarding or through ongoing portfolio monitoring. The core value is a proprietary, privileged, or hard-to-assemble data source that surfaces distress before it becomes public or appears in traditional credit bureau data. Relevant signals include: payroll/tax-deposit delinquency, IRS or state tax compliance data, UCC filing velocity, MCA (merchant cash advance) stacking, days-to-pay / trade-payment-behavior drift, lien and judgment activity, WARN/layoff notices, executive departures, and adverse media. Buyers are lenders, factorers, MCA funders, insurers, or any B2B company carrying accounts-receivable risk. Ideal target is founder-owned with no PE backing, $2–4M EBITDA, defensible differentiation rooted in unique data access, in financial-services/IT, healthcare-services/IT, or business-services/IT. companies in NCP Priority Geography (Eastern US). Exclude: Not order-to-cash, AR automation, collections, invoicing, or cash-application workflow software. Not consumer credit, credit repair, or personal-finance products. Not tax-resolution or debt-relief firms. Not commodity data resellers or aggregators that simply repackage public records or licensed bureau data with no proprietary access point. Not pure business-verification/KYB tools where the data is public and free at the source. Not large, well-funded, or PE/VC-backed incumbents. Not trade-credit insurers themselves. Differentiation must come from unique data, not workflow convenience.

Got it. I know what NCP looks for — founder-owned, differentiated, right to win, growing market, no PE on the cap table. I'll search multiple channels and only bring you companies I'm genuinely excited about (conviction 6+/10). You'll get 5 with investment memos. Give me feedback on each one and I'll learn your preferences.

last_event.message: Pipeline ready. Configure and click Start.
